{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323135401377BC76787D7772D8BD4"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607871208552350526","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有点内容能吸引人"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771350313,"group_id":"7576665691793673241","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5limLU2jTS9OHAkvKN22AtYSLUqI0tw0VQYxzr/2nrf","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3378136927438413","user_name":"爱吃炸金针菇的王懿儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3378136927438413","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7576665691793673241","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统，一爽到底，需要带脑子观看）
他曾是一位天才古玩修复师，因一场精心设计的陷阱，身败名裂，女友葬身火海。
隐忍两年后，他化名吴道，携融合古今的极致做旧术强势归来，誓要让所有仇人血债血偿！
从鉴宝节目上当众砸碎“元青花”羞辱专家团。
到设局拍卖假印章让仇人李家损失千万。
再到与美女鉴定师联手，偷天换日夺回被掠夺的国宝梅瓶。
现代科技加上古法技艺，让他做出的赝品真假难辨，将古玩界搅得天翻地覆。
他要让那些曾经高高在上的人，尝尝从云端跌落地狱的滋味！
这次，他要将失去的一切，加倍讨回！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1119c14dde5c73f80a9d43682720162c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"海底杠上炮","author_id":"","book_id":"7576665691793673241","book_name":"鉴宝：我，做旧宗师，真假由我定","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":17,"name":"鉴宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=17&name=鉴宝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7576668465386226201","read_count":"132","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"280497"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"112","tags":"都市日常,都市,鉴宝,黑化,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1119c14dde5c73f80a9d43682720162c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429241&x-signature=Kpa70L81QGKXcYQhV8ACvnqnOOw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111007557786","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"14"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323135401377BC76787D7772D8BD4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读59分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3551,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_aut
